message:
feat(distributed): add session-scope tracking with reconnect cleanup and sequence namespacing

Add DistributedSequenceScopeState tracking active connections, replay_id,
and inactive_since per sender-session scope. Add distributed_resolve_session_id,
distributed_sender_session_scope (with hash suffix for namespacing),
distributed_register_sequence_scope, and distributed_prune_stale_sequence_scopes
lifecycle management.

Create Aggregator with disabled internal stale pruning since the listener
now owns session lifecycle externally. Add SessionReplayGuard::remove()
for explicit session removal. Integration test verifies two sequential
TCP connections with different session IDs, aggregator sequence reset,
and proper cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
